venue.title: The Estate at Oak Falls
venue.description: Nestled in the heart of the valley, the estate offers a timeless backdrop of rolling hills and whispering oaks. It is where our ceremony and reception will both take place, ensuring a seamless flow for our celebration.

details.label: Ceremony Start
details.value: Arrivals from 3:30 PM. Ceremony at 4:00 PM

image.alt: Mediterranean-style wedding estate at dusk with limestone walls, terracotta tiles, cypress trees, and olive groves.

stay.title: Recommended Stay
stay.copy: We have secured room blocks at these nearby hotels for your comfort. Please mention the James & Aly wedding when booking.

hotels.title: The Cretan Sands Resort
hotels.description: A charming luxury inn with scenic views and calm terraces. Perfect for guests who want to stay close to the celebration.

image.alt: Luxury boutique hotel terrace with wicker furniture, white linens, and soft morning light.

hotels.title: The Olive Grove Estate
hotels.description: A modern resort offering extensive spa facilities and quiet poolside spaces. A shuttle service will be provided from here.

image.alt: Luxury spa hotel pool at sunrise with cream umbrellas, still water, and natural wood accents.

gettingThere.title: Getting There
gettingThere.copy: Crete is reachable through several major airports. We recommend renting a car if you plan to explore the island before or after the wedding weekend.

tips.title: By Air
tips.description: Most guests will fly directly from the UK to Chania (CHQ) or Heraklion (HER) airports. Both are well-connected and offer easy access to the venue.

tips.title: Local Driving
tips.description: Car rentals are readily available at the airport and are recommended for exploring the island. Please note that driving is on the right-hand side of the road.

tips.title: Event Shuttle
tips.description: A shuttle service will run between the recommended hotels and the venue to ensure everyone travels safely and together.

tips.title: Local Tip
tips.description: Cell service can be spotty on winding roads. We suggest downloading offline maps of Crete before you arrive.

feature.caption: We can't wait to welcome you.

image.alt: Panoramic valley landscape at sunset with soft rose and lavender light over the mountains.
